issues.title: Plaintext secret-like environment variable
issues.description: An environment variable name suggests a secret and is set to a plaintext value.
issues.impact: Secrets may be exposed in logs, artifacts, or workflow history.
issues.remediation: Use GitHub Secrets and reference via `${{ secrets.NAME }}`.

issues.title: Security group open to the world (Terraform)
issues.description: Security group rule allows 0.0.0.0/0 to sensitive ports.
issues.impact: Increases risk of brute-force and exploitation.

issues.title: Privileged container
issues.description: Container is running in privileged mode.
issues.impact: Privileged containers can access host resources.
issues.remediation: Disable privileged mode and use least privileges.

issues.title: Docker socket exposed in Compose
issues.description: Compose service mounts the Docker socket.
issues.impact: Compromise could lead to host takeover via Docker daemon.

issues.title: RDS instance publicly accessible
issues.impact: Database could be reached from the internet.
issues.remediation: Place RDS in private subnets and disable public access.
